svg.title: Netbox Auth Flow Diagram
svg.desc: Security-focused authentication pipeline from Game Client through PlayFab and Photon custom auth to connection approval or rejection

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Game Client send in the Netbox auth flow?')
sendPrompt('How does Netbox log in to PlayFab?')
sendPrompt('What device info does the Netbox Auth Manager send to PlayFab?')
sendPrompt('How does PlayFab CloudScript generate a short-lived token?')
sendPrompt('How does Photon custom auth validate the PlayFab token?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a player is allowed to connect in Photon?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a player is rejected in Netbox auth?')

svg.text: Token never touches the client — all auth is server-to-server
